description: A subject glides across a parallax pastel scene while the hook title reveals letter-by-letter, in-place (faint->pop), synced to the subject's motion. Emphasis word is red.
whenToUse: The opening hook of the video (one per video).
produces: gpt-image-2 start/end frames (subject left->right over a wide parallax skyline) -> Veo 3.1 Lite plate (6s) -> Remotion HeroVeoTitle overlay for the title.
pipeline: gpt-image-2: wide skyline + START frame (subject left) + END frame (skyline scrolled, subject right)
Veo 3.1 Lite: durationSeconds=6, 1080p/16:9, start+end, generateAudio=false, camera pans (parallax)
Remotion HeroVeoTitle: video as background, title reveals per-letter in-place synced to subject

sceneDescription.note: the parallax scene, e.g. pastel city skyline

line1.note: white title line, no baked text in the image/Veo

timing.note: letter triggers locked to the MEASURED subject trajectory (playbook §5), NOT a linear guess

rules: Never bake the title into the gpt-image-2 or Veo output — text is Remotion-only.
Every image/Veo prompt begins with the STYLE BLOCK (production-rules §1a).
Title reveal = per-letter in-place fade synced to measured subject X; red only on the emphasis word.
Veo is expensive — reserve this treatment for the opening/hero beat.
